sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n59788" key="krei=os" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κρεῖος</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n59788.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">v.</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">κριός</ref> </xr> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0221.tlg001:111" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">111</biblScope></bibl>, VII. <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κρείουσα</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">v.</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">κρείων</ref></xr>.</sense> </entryFree>
